name: omx
description: Full oh-my-codex workflow layer skills for OpenAI Codex CLI, including setup, planning, team orchestration, and persistent execution loops.

interface.longDescription: Provides the full OMX skill surface (deep-interview, ralplan, ralph, team, ultrawork, and supporting skills) plus setup/doctor workflows to bootstrap and run consistent Codex execution pipelines.
defaultPrompt: Use $deep-interview to clarify this request, then $ralplan for consensus planning.
Carry this approved plan to completion with $ralph and verification.
Run /omx:setup to install Codex + OMX if missing and verify with omx doctor.
